reason: The mockup establishes an exceptionally clear, highly-focused visual hierarchy specifically tailored to mobile contact onboarding. Information density is kept well under the limits of Miller's Law (7±2) with exactly 7 distinct visual units, preventing cognitive overload and maintaining user focus. Related items (such as CSV column mappings and upload status indications) are grouped cleanly in individual container cards adhering to the Gestalt Principle of Proximity. Color contrast is fully compliant with WCAG 2.1 AA requirements, achieving ratios well above 4.5:1 on body text, titles, and call-to-actions, ensuring that the interface is highly accessible. Leniency is applied to keep the development velocity high.
concerns: The mockup completely omits the spintax editing interface requested in the brief, focusing exclusively on CSV contact upload.
The APP FIELD dropdown under Field Mapping uses an unstyled borderless design which lacks visual signifiers (affordances) of interactivity.
The bottom navigation bar uses a fixed 'h-20' class which might cause content overlapping or layout squishing on extremely small mobile resolutions.
